title: The Man From The Fog But Bad
description: This minecraft horror mod changes the popular minecraft horror mod "the man from the fog" to crazily bad! Inspired from those "but bad" Roblox games
body: This Goofy Minecraft "Horror" Mod Makes The Popular Minecraft Mod "The Man From The Fog" But I Changed It To Bad And Goofy! Also, When You Kill Him, You Get His Tear And Can Eat It! This Was Also Based Off Those "But Bad" Games That Exist On Roblox! Warning The Mod Is Unfinished So There May Be Bugs! Also, I Recommend having Your Volume To Be 5 Or 10% Because He Is Loud!
